# YAML Test Suite (vendored data)

The community YAML Test Suite's data form: `in.yaml`, `test.event`, and `error`
per case — nothing else. libyeast folds its yeast token stream up to this event
level and checks compatibility (see `generator/`).

- Source: https://github.com/yaml/yaml-test-suite
- Branch: `data`
- Pinned commit: 6ad3d2c62885d82fc349026c136ef560838fdf3d
